title: recordlinkage
summary:
A powerful and modular toolkit for record linkage and duplicate detection in Python 
 RecordLinkage is a powerful and modular record linkage toolkit to link records in or between data sources. The toolkit provides most of the tools needed for record linkage and deduplication. The package contains indexing methods, functions to compare records and classifiers. The package is developed for research and the linking of small or medium
